name: Lemon Rosette
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs in a blender.
2. Add milk; blend until smooth and creamy.
3. Gradually add flour, salt, sugar, and lemon extract to the egg mixture.
4. Set aside for 30 minutes.
5. Heat oil to 365°F (185°C).
6. Preheat the rosette iron by dipping it into the hot oil for 10 seconds.
7. Drain slightly on paper towel.
8. Dip the hot iron into the batter.
9. Return the iron to the hot oil and let the rosette drop into the oil.
10. Brown on one side, then turn and brown on the other side.
11. Remove from oil and drain on paper towel.
12. Sprinkle with powdered sugar.
